title: keteleeria fortunei var. oblonga
intro: Keteleeria fortunei var. oblonga, also known as the Chinese fir, is a coniferous evergreen tree native to China. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is used to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Keteleeria fortunei var. oblonga include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to reduce pain and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions for internal use, or as topical creams and ointments for external application.
